name: logistics managers at freight brokers processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For logistics managers at freight brokers processing 10–50 invoices/month, discrepancies cause late orders. We reconcile shipment tracking data with billing records instead of manual reconciliation of shipment and billing data.
target_audience: logistics managers at freight brokers processing 10–50 invoices/month
problem_solved: discrepancies between shipment tracking data and billing records
features: manual data entry for shipment and billing records

locked_fields.primary_user: logistics managers at freight brokers processing 10–50 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: discrepancies between shipment tracking data and billing records
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For logistics managers at freight brokers processing 10–50 invoices/month, discrepancies cause late orders. We reconcile shipment tracking data with billing records instead of manual reconciliation of shipment and billing data.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual reconciliation of shipment and billing data
must_have_features: manual data entry for shipment and billing records

one_liner: For logistics managers at freight brokers processing 10–50 invoices/month, discrepancies cause late orders. We reconcile shipment tracking data with billing records instead of manual reconciliation of shipment and billing data.
